Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
PLC1 – OPPORUNITY (Why)
(Introduction and Positioning)
Welcome to the (workshop name) … whether you (avatar situation 1), or (avatar situation
2) this is the place to be, the place to (achieve this desired result).
I’m (name) and I’ve been (doing/teaching/helping others achieve these results) for (time
period). (Add any other positioning/ authority credentials /prior accomplishments you
have.)
This is the first in a series of (number) training videos in this workshop – where I’ll be
teaching you (how to accomplish this desired result).
(Show the Opportunity)
So how do you (accomplish this task) and (achieve this result)?
The goal of this workshop is to show you the critical things you need to know to (achieve this
desired result).
When you (are able to/know this) then you can (have/achieve/feel this).
(Share your Launch Story)
I didn’t always know (this topic). When I first started (doing this) (x# months/years ago) (this
is where I was).
(This is what I aspired to be) and/or (this is the pain I wanted to avoid…)
(This is how I discovered the answer…)
(Teach – Share a Secret or Two)
So let’s dig in. In this first video we’re going to focus on (achieving this result)…
(teach content)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
(Raise objections and either answer them or promise to answer them in
upcoming videos)
Now, one important note… You don’t have to (list common objection/challenge and solution)
Or
Now at this point, the big question is (raise and address a common objection).
(Foreshadow PLC2)
In the next video, we’re going to cover (next topic) and (desired result that comes from
knowing that topic). I’m also going to show you (another topic) - this is really important
because (benefit of knowing that).
(Call to Action)
But right now, I want to know a little more about you… what does (being able to achieve this
desired result we just talked about) mean to you? Please scroll down below this video and tell
me in the comments section.
And of course, if you liked this video and found it useful, I would love if you clicked the like
button, and if you shared it with your friends.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
PLC2 – TRANSFORMATION (WHAT & HOW)
(Introduction & Positioning)
Welcome to the (workshop name) … this is the second video in the workshop and whether
you (avatar situation 1), or (avatar situation 2) this is the place to be, the place to (achieve
this desired result).
I’m (name) and I’ve been (doing/teaching/helping others achieve these results) for (time
period). (Add any other positioning/ authority credentials /prior accomplishments you
have.)
In this workshop, I’ll be teaching you (tell what you’re teaching in this video series).
(Recap last video and tell what’s covered in this one)
Now if you missed the first video in this series, you should go check it out because I covered
(this topic) and I showed (how to achieve this desired result). If you haven’t seen that video
yet, go watch it right now… there’s a link to it at the top of this page… and then come back for
this second video. I’ll still be here waiting for you… J
Now in this video, I’m going to show you (topics) that can help you (achieve this desired
result).
I’m also going to show you (another topic) so (you get these results).
Now we’re going to be covering a lot of ground today, so be sure to download the PDF (name
your download) on this page so you can follow along and take notes.
(Recap the opportunity)
So there’s a reason you’re watching this video. It’s either (you’re in this situation and want to
accomplish this) or (you’re in this situation and want to accomplish this so you can have
this).
And there’s never been a better time to (get this result or do this thing) because (explain
why).
(Recap your positioning)
Now… I’ve (helped/taught/coached/trained) (this many people) (accomplish this goal).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
But when I first started out, I (was in this situation).
Now I’m in a different place – I’ve (accomplished this).
And it all started with (this step).
(Present a Case Study or do Some Real Teaching)
That’s what this video is all about… how to (do this and then have this result/benefit).
So in this video, I’m going to show you (how to achieve this desired result).
So to get started with (this first topic)… the first thing to do is (this action)…
(teach content)
(Objection Crushing)
OK, we covered a huge amount of ground in this video. Take a deep breath. You don’t need to
DO all of it… you don’t need to KNOW all of it. This video was about (specific topic and
outcome) and how it’s possible to (have this outcome) by (doing these steps).
A lot of people have been asking about (crush objections).
(Call to Action)
Now I want to hear from you - what action are you going to take to get started? Let me know
in the comments below.
Now if you found value in this video, please share it with at least three people you know –
especially if they have any thought of (accomplishing this task too). It’s easier to get started
on this journey when you have other people on the path with you.
(Foreshadow PLC3)
Now I want to tell you about the next video I’ve got for you: that’s the (topic). You’re going to
love this one. In fact, I think it will be your favorite in this series. I’m going to walk you
through (how to achieve this desired result). And you’re also going to be able to download the
(name of handout) – it’s going to be really cool and I think you’re going to love it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

(Final Call to Action)
But right now, please scroll down and… first of all, hit that like button. Everyone likes to get
likes. And then leave a comment for me.
Scroll on down and leave a comment for me right now… and I’ll see you in the next video.

Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
PLC3 – Ownership Experience
(Introduction)
Hey there… it’s (name) here, and welcome to the (workshop name) … if you’re ready to
(achieve this desired result), then this is the place to be, the place to be
I’m (name) and I’ve been (doing/teaching/helping others achieve these results) for (time
period). (Add any other positioning/ authority credentials /prior accomplishments you
have.)
This is our third video – the (topic), and I think you’re going to love it.
Now if you missed the first two videos in this Workshop, I highly recommend you stop right
now and go watch them… they really are required viewing for anyone who wants to (achieve
these desired results). I want you to get the full value of this workshop, so you should really
go watch those videos in order… don’t worry, I’ll be waiting for you. J
OK, so this video is all about (topic) – it’s about (expand on topic)
In the first video in this workshop, I taught you about (how to achieve this result)… and I
shared (recap your struggle story and how it turned out amazing).
Now, one of the things I want help you achieve today is (this result)…
(teach content)
(Possibly present a short Case Study)
The success my (clients/students) have gotten has been amazing… (present case study)
(Answer the top questions you’ve been getting)
One of the (limiting beliefs/common myths/most common questions) people have, has
been… (crush objections)
(Explain the big view and how to make it happen)
Once you know how to do (this step/action), then you can (have this desired result).
When you have (this desired result), then (this is how that feels).
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Module 5 – PLC Skeleton Scripts
In order to (have this desired result), you just need to (follow these simple steps or learn how
to accomplish this next level thing).
(Pivot to your offer and create a soft landing)
It’s been awesome sharing this information and seeing the excitement and results…
That’s why I put together this workshop…
This has been awesome, fun and rewarding creating and sharing these videos with you. I’ve
been getting great comments and I love the interaction and community it has created.
I know these free videos have already made a big impact on many people who have been
commenting, maybe it’s even helped you.
Now if you’re interested in taking this even further and taking the next step, I’ve put together
an advanced training program for a small group of people (give some details).
(Seed the scarcity of your launch offer)
I’ll be opening the course next (day), we’ll enroll a new class, and then we’ll have to close
registration so we can start the program….be on the lookout for the email…
(Call to action)
My next video will be all about (transformation) and I’ll have lots of details about the
upcoming (program name) and how you can get started… so look for that video very soon.
But in the meantime, I would love to hear about (what you’ll do with information, how you’ll
feel when you achieve these results, what questions you have about this topic, etc.) … scroll
down and leave a comment for me.
And hit that Facebook like button… but most important – leave a comment for me. I’ve been
reading every comment and responding to dozens of them and I would love to hear from you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
